availability.note: Whole EU + rest of EFTA Europe + Great Britain, then USA, Canada and Australia. No other countries. Codes are ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; the submit script maps them to Apple's alpha-3 territory ids.

en-US.description:
Meet Vorinthex AI.

Your personal AI Brain.

Vorinthex AI is a next-generation AI platform designed to help you think, create, organize, and grow.

Instead of switching between dozens of disconnected apps and AI tools, Vorinthex brings everything together into one intelligent experience that learns, remembers, and evolves with you over time.

Built around a modern AI-native architecture, Vorinthex combines memory, productivity, creativity, communication, and personal growth into a single platform. Whether you're capturing ideas, organizing knowledge, managing information, or exploring new possibilities, your AI adapts to the way you work and helps you stay focused on what matters most.

Designed with a premium obsidian black, chrome, and silver aesthetic, Vorinthex delivers a fast, intuitive, and distraction-free experience built for the next generation of AI.

This is only the beginning. Vorinthex is continuously evolving with new intelligence, capabilities, and experiences that expand what your personal AI Brain can do over time.

One Brain.
Infinite Possibilities.
en-US.promotionalText: Your personal AI Brain that learns, remembers, and evolves with you.
